modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Panopto says it needs an update to record a session.

full_description_text: 
I was trying to use Panopto to record my session, but then it told me that it’s out of date. It said I need to update it to the latest version. I just want to make sure I can record my stuff without any problems, but I’m not sure how to do the update.
short_description: Panopto says it needs an update to record a session.
description: I was trying to use Panopto to record my session, but then it told me that it’s out of date. It said I need to update it to the latest version. I just want to make sure I can record my stuff without any problems, but I’m not sure how to do the update.
